searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: The product or category keyword to search for (e.g. 'milk', 'chips', 'biscuit')

platforms.title: Platforms to Scrape
platforms.description: Which platforms to scrape. Defaults to both Blinkit and Zepto.

location.title: Delivery Location (Blinkit)
location.description: Delivery location for Blinkit (e.g. 'Connaught Place, New Delhi'). Zepto uses Mumbai by default.

maxItems.title: Max Items per Platform
maxItems.description: Maximum number of products to scrape from each platform (1-500).
